channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The pope moves to police AI
item.description: Vatican builds AI defenses and positions as global referee.

item.title: ICE detention center expansion sparks national protest
item.description: Planned ICE detention expansion fuels nationwide protests on Saturday.

item.title: Trump's oil export surge during Iran war will hit ceiling
item.description: Middle East oil disruptions boost U.S. exports, but growth limits remain.

item.title: Mike Johnson faces 'hell week' as Republicans defy Trump
item.description: Johnson faces tough pre-recess session with three high-stakes votes.

item.title: DeSantis plots end run of Florida law to create more GOP seats
item.description: DeSantis quietly works to bypass Florida's anti-gerrymandering law for GOP seats.
